description: Whimsical is a collaborative visual workspace for creating diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, wireframes, docs, and related product-planning artifacts. It also offers AI-assisted workflows that connect Whimsical workspaces to coding and chat tools.
summary: Whimsical exposes a beta HTTP API authenticated with Whimsical-issued OAuth 2.1 credentials, plus a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.whimsical.com/mcp` that uses OAuth login from MCP clients.
